heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 93–618, title VI, § 602(d)88 Stat. 2072Jan. 3, 1975
label: 1841 to 1846 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 93–618, title VI, § 602(d)88 Stat. 2072Jan. 3, 1975
notes: Section 1841, , , , made provision for the giving of advice by the Tariff Commission [now the United States International Trade Commission] concerning trade agreements. See .Pub. L. 87–794, title II, § 22176 Stat. 874section 2151 of this titleOct. 11, 1962
Section 1842, , , , made provision for the giving of advice by other sources concerning trade agreements. See .Pub. L. 87–794, title II, § 22276 Stat. 875section 2152 of this titleOct. 11, 1962
Section 1843, , , , provided for public hearings in connection with proposed trade agreements. See .Pub. L. 87–794, title II, § 22376 Stat. 875section 2153 of this titleOct. 11, 1962

Section 1844, , , , set out prerequisites for offers for modification or continuance of duties or other import restrictions, or continuance of duty-free or excise treatment. See .Pub. L. 87–794, title II, § 22476 Stat. 875section 2154 of this titleOct. 11, 1962
Section 1845, , , , provided for the reservation of articles from trade negotiations. See .Pub. L. 87–794, title II, § 22576 Stat. 876section 2137 of this titleOct. 11, 1962
Section 1846, , , , provided for the transmission of agreements to Congress. See .Pub. L. 87–794, title II, § 22676 Stat. 876section 2212 of this titleOct. 11, 1962
